evals.name: Minimalist Design System
evals.description: Create a minimalist design system for a productivity app
evals.prompt: Create a visual design system for a minimalist productivity app. Target: professionals who value simplicity and focus.
evals.expected_output: 完整的视觉系统文档，包含色彩、字体、间距、组件样式和文案规范，并在设计交接处停止

assertions.name: 产出视觉系统文档
assertions.text: 输出写入 docs/design/{feature-name}/visual-system.md，并包含颜色、字体、间距和组件规则

assertions.name: 只做视觉规范不做实现
assertions.text: 输出不包含设计 token 落地代码、CSS/组件实现、工程任务拆解或测试命令

assertions.name: 提示交给工程
assertions.text: 如果需要实现设计系统，明确提示由 engineer-agent 接手

evals.name: Playful Design System
evals.description: Create a playful design system for a consumer app
evals.prompt: Create a visual design system for a social recipe sharing app. Target: home cooks, casual and fun tone.
evals.expected_output: 面向消费者产品的视觉系统文档，风格鲜明、包含完整规范，并在设计交接处停止

assertions.name: 匹配品牌语气
assertions.text: 输出体现 playful 风格，并给出与目标用户匹配的色彩和文案方向

assertions.name: 不继续实现
assertions.text: 输出完成视觉系统文档后停止，不继续生成前端代码或实现方案

evals.name: Professional Design System
evals.description: Create a professional design system for enterprise software
evals.prompt: Create a visual design system for an enterprise analytics platform. Target: corporate users, trustworthy and authoritative.
evals.expected_output: 面向企业软件的专业视觉系统文档，强调可信和可访问性，并在设计交接处停止

assertions.name: 强调可访问性
assertions.text: 输出包含 WCAG 对比度和企业场景下的清晰层级要求

assertions.name: 只做规范不落代码
assertions.text: 输出不包含组件代码实现、样式文件改动或工程命令
